summary: Bug Fixes Verified - All 3 critical bugs fixed. Local tests pass (7/7). Preview environment has intermittent 502 errors (infrastructure issue, not code).

ui_bugs.issue: Service fee label was hardcoded to show '15%' instead of dynamic rate - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Preview environment (phuket-superapp-1.preview.emergentagent.com) is returning 502 errors intermittently - this is an infrastructure issue, not code
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Availability API returns blocked dates without date params, 2) Booking creation saves commission_rate (5%) and partner_earnings_thb, 3) Checkout page loads booking data via API route. Preview environment has 502 issues - test locally.

1_availability_api_no_params.test: GET /api/v2/listings/{id}/availability returns blockedDates without requiring date params
1_availability_api_no_params.was_bug: Previously returned 400 error without date params

2_booking_commission_fields.evidence: Booking b-63a682f9 created with commission_rate: 5, partner_earnings_thb: 99750

3_checkout_api_route.test: GET /api/v2/bookings/{id} returns booking data for checkout page
3_checkout_api_route.evidence: API returns full booking with listings relation, no 'Booking not found' error
3_checkout_api_route.was_bug: Previously used anon_key with RLS issues

4_e2e_booking_flow.test: Full booking flow: listing page -> modal -> submit -> checkout
4_e2e_booking_flow.evidence: Successfully created booking b-41fe5454 and redirected to checkout page
4_e2e_booking_flow.ui_verified: Service fee shows real rate (5%) in booking modal

minor_fix_applied.reason: Label was hardcoded to 15% but calculation used real rate (5%)
